characters.appearance: Female, young adult, slim build, fair complexion, dark hair pulled back. She has a robotic, metallic neck and a cyborg-like patch over her left eye.
characters.wardrobe: Maroon traditional Indian outfit with intricate gold embroidery.

characters.appearance: Male, young adult, average build, fair complexion, short dark hair, clean-shaven. His facial features are soft and approachable.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: सर, मैं आज छुट्टी लेना चाहता हूँ। [Sir, I want to take a leave today.]
Character A says: Sir, I'd like to take a leave today.
Character B says: मुझे एक पर्सनल काम है। [I have a personal matter to attend to.]
Character A says: I have a personal matter to attend to.
Character B says: मैं अपना काम पहले कम्पलीट कर दूंगा। [I will complete my work beforehand.]
Character A says: I will complete my work beforehand.
Character B says: अगर ज़रूरत पड़ी, तो फ़ोन पे अवेलेबल रहूँगा। [If needed, I will be available on the phone.]
Character A says: I will be available on phone if needed.
Character B says: सर आपसे परमिशन चाहिए। [Sir, I need your permission.]
Character A says: I'm seeking your permission.
Character B says: अरे ये तो बहुत आसान है। [Oh, this is very easy.]
Character A says: हाँ, इंग्लिश बोलना आसान ही है। बस तुम्हें रोज़ ऐसे ही प्रैक्टिस करनी है, और तुम्हारा कॉन्फिडेंस एकदम बढ़ जाएगा। [Yes, speaking English is easy. You just have to practice like this daily, and your confidence will completely increase.]
Character B says: ये मैं कहाँ कर सकता हूँ? [Where can I do this?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable real-world scenario (asking for leave at the office).
- Demonstrates the core learning loop: translating practical Hindi thoughts into professional English.
- Replaces the competitor's unrealistic 'two weeks' hype with Supernova's practical focus on daily practice and building confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Office main kaam aane wali English. lena chahta hoon. a leave today. Mujhe ek personal. I have a personal matter. Main apna kaam. I will complete my work. Agar zaroorat padi. I will be available. aapse permission. seeking your permission. aasaan hai. English bolna. roz practice karni hai. confidence badh jayega. kahan kar sakta hoon.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: तुम्हें बस Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करना है। [You just have to download the Supernova app.]
Character A says: इसमें मेरे जैसे एआई ट्यूटर तुम्हें बिना किसी जजमेंट के रियल-लाइफ सिचुएशंस के लिए इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कराएंगे। [In this, AI tutors like me will make you practice English for real-life situations without any judgment.]
Character A says: और तुम बिना डरे इंग्लिश बोल पाओगे। [And you will be able to speak English without fear.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करो और कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना शुरू करो। [Download Supernova today and start speaking English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the Supernova app as the solution to the user's problem.
- Highlights key Supernova value propositions: AI tutor, judgment-free practice, and real-life situations.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging call-to-action focused on speaking without fear, rather than making unrealistic fluency guarantees.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Office main kaam aane wali English. Supernova App. Practice with AI Tutor. Bina kisi judgment ke. Real-life situations. Speak English confidently. Download Supernova today.
